name: Robbie Schingler
background: Mr. Schingler is a co-founder of Planet and has served as our Chief Strategy Officer since December 2010 and as a member of our board of directors since December 2010. Prior to Planet, Mr. Schingler was a Presidential Management Fellow at NASA Ames Research Center from 2005 to 2010. Mr. Schingler holds an M.B.A. from Georgetown University and a B.S. in Engineering Physics from Santa Clara University.

company_affiliations.name: Planet Labs PBC
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Co-Founder, Chief Strategy Officer, and Member of the Board of Directors
